productDisplayName: Doodle Boy Rockstar-sing it Yellow Tshirts
description: Composition Yellow round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, stitch detailing on the sleeve and shirt hems, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline and graphic print on the chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Bring out the rockstar in your little boy with this yellow t-shirt from doodle. The graphic print exudes with rockstar energy, while the cotton fabric keeps him fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with denim shorts and sneakers for that cool, comfy look.
